question.stem: Aiden and Bala shared some stickers in the ratio 5 : 3. Aiden received 24 more stickers than Bala.

parts.label: a
parts.text: The bar model below represents the stickers shared between Aiden and Bala. How many stickers did they share altogether?

marking_scheme.description: 5 - 3 = 2 units represent the difference, so 1 unit = 24 / 2 = 12.

solution_steps.text: The difference in units is 5 - 3 = 2 units, which represents 24 stickers.
Altogether there are 5 + 3 = 8 units, so the total = 8 x 12 = 96 stickers.

diagram.alt_text: Bar model: Aiden's bar is 5 equal units long and Bala's bar is 3 equal units long, with a brace marking a difference of 24 stickers.

parts.label: b
parts.text: What fraction of the stickers did Bala receive?

marking_scheme.description: Bala received 3 out of 8 units = 3/8 of the stickers.

solution_steps.text: Bala received 3 units out of the total 8 units, so his share is 3/8.
